1000615556.english: Eww~! Even if Moonbit says that... it still looks like that to you, Big Sis?
1000615556.korean: 으으응~! 백토가 그렇게 말해도... 언니 눈에는 그게 그것처럼 보이거든?

1000615557.english: Songpyeon, which is filled with the magic of the moon, is also used to celebrate the full moon...
1000615557.korean: 달의 마력이 담긴 송편'은 만월야를 기념할 때도 쓰이지만...

1000615558.english: That's right. Moonbit has always wanted to perform an important lunar ritual with the president.
1000615558.korean: 그게 있죠. 백토가 예전부터 사장님이랑 중~요한 달의 의식을 치르고 싶어했거든요.

1000615559.english: Commander! This older sister has some business to attend to in the old town.
1000615559.korean: 사령관~! 이 누나가 구 시가지쪽에 조금 볼일이 생겼거든.

1000615560.english: Oh my, thank you so much~! Our Commander, you're so cool today, aren't you?
1000615560.korean: 어머, 너무 고마워~! 우리 사령관 시원시원한게 오늘도 정말 멋지거든?

1000615562.english: If there's anything else to fix, just say it~?
1000615562.korean: 또 고칠 게 있으면 말만 하는 거거든~?

1000615563.english: - We are continuously strengthening our forces by stockpiling supplies and temporarily taking control of the area.
1000615563.korean: - 물자를 비축하고, 한시적이나마 지역을 장악하는 등 우리는 지속적으로 전력을 증강하고 있다.

1000615564.english: The most important of these is personnel replenishment. Rescuing isolated Bioroids or restoring them with genetic seeds is crucial.
1000615564.korean: - 그중에서도 가장 중요한 것은 인원의 충원. 고립된 바이오로이드들을 구출하거나 유전자 씨앗으로 복원하는 일이다.

1000615565.english: - And I'm waiting for one of the agents who was restored using the genetic seed I secured a while ago.
1000615565.korean: - 그리고 난 지금 얼마전에 확보한 유전자 씨앗으로 복원된 대원 중 한 명을 기다리고 있다.

1000615569.english: - Aurora sat down cautiously on the sofa opposite me.
1000615569.korean: - 아우로라는 내 맞은편 소파에 조심스럽게 앉았다.

1000615570.english: Oh, this... I made this to check the functionality. Do you want to eat it?
1000615570.korean: 아, 이거... 기능점검 삼아 만든건데, 먹을래?

1000615571.english: - When I accepted the plate, Aurora looked down at her body again and smiled awkwardly.
1000615571.korean: - 내가 접시를 받아들자 아우로라는 새삼스레 자신의 몸을 내려다보며 난처하게 웃었다.

1000615572.english: ...There's no problem, but it doesn't feel real. The world has already been destroyed, and I've died and been restored... It's not like I'm actually dead, though...
1000615572.korean: ...문제는 없지만 실감은 안 나. 세상은 벌써 멸망했고, 나는 죽었다가 다시 복원된 거라니... 정확히는 '내'가 죽은 건 아니지만...

1000615573.english: Oh, don't worry too much about it. We don't usually have ego problems.
1000615573.korean: 아, 너무 신경쓰진 마. 일반적으로 우리는 자아에 대한 문제를 겪지는 않으니까.

1000615574.english: I took a bite of the scone Aurora gave me. This is... wonderful? Maybe even better than Sowan's...
1000615574.korean: - 아우로라가 준 스콘을 하나 집어먹었다. 이건... 훌륭한데? 어쩌면 소완보다도...

1000615576.english: - Aurora looked at me with a strange expression.

1000615577.english: I heard earlier that the only human left was the Commander...
1000615577.korean: 아까 남은 인간님은 사령관 뿐이라고 들었는데...

1000615578.english: - An awkward silence fell as Aurora closed her mouth.
1000615578.korean: - 아우로라가 입을 다무는 바람에 어색한 침묵이 감돌았다.

1000615579.english: - It still seems awkward, so I decided to bring up the topic myself.
1000615579.korean: - 아직은 어색한 모양이니 내쪽에서 화제를 꺼내기로 했다.

1000615580.english: Aurora's expression softened slightly as I brought up the company story I'd heard before going in for the functional inspection. "Sweets & Dreams," I think?
1000615580.korean: - 기능점검을 하러 가기 전에 들었던 회사의 이야기를 꺼내자 아우로라의 표정이 조금 풀어졌다. 'Sweets & Dreams' 라고 했던가?

1000615581.english: Oh, yeah. I... To be exact, I heard that it was the company that the old 'Aurora' model worked for, right?
1000615581.korean: 아, 응. 내가... 정확히는 예전의 '아우로라' 기종이 일하던 회사라는 것 까지는 들었지?

1000615582.english: "Choco Queen" was the nickname of the president of Sweet & Dreams, where I worked. She made all kinds of desserts and sweets, but her chocolate was especially special.
1000615582.korean: 초코 여왕은 내가 일하던 Sweet & Dreams의 회장님 별명이야. &n디저트랑 과자류는 전부 잘 만드셨지만, 그중에서도 특히 초콜릿이 최고였거든.

1000615583.english: Right? I think she was a bit self-conscious.
1000615583.korean: 그치? 조금 자의식이 강한 분이었던 것 같아.

1000615585.english: Today is even more special because there are new people...
1000615585.korean: 오늘은 새로운 분들도 계시니 더욱 특별한...

1000615586.english: - Sowan's eyes widened as she entered the captain's cabin.

1000615587.english: Master... May I ask what on earth is going on?
1000615587.korean: 주인... 이게 대체 어찌된 일이온지, 여쭈어도 되겠사옵니까?

1000615588.english: - I took Aurora’s hand—she was hesitating, looking around nervously as if she were shy—and helped her to her feet.
1000615588.korean: - 낯을 가리는지 눈치를 보며 우물쭈물하는 아우로라의 손을 잡아 일으켰다.

1000615590.english: Why... are you eating food made by someone I don't give permission for...?
1000615590.korean: 어찌하여... 소첩이 허락하지 않은 분이 만든 음식을 드시는 것이옵니까...?

1000615591.english: Oh, sorry. Are you the chef here?

1000615592.english: I saw in the records that she was an incredible cook...

1000615593.english: - Sowan continued speaking without even looking at Aurora.
1000615593.korean: - 소완은 아우로라에게는 눈길도 주지않고 말을 이었다.

1000615594.english: The master's meals are all under the concubine's jurisdiction.

1000615595.english: You must not eat food unless it is prepared by you or prepared by someone who has given you permission.
1000615595.korean: 소첩이 직접 요리하거나, 허가한 분의 것이 아니면 드셔선 아니되옵니다.

1000615596.english: Sowan's words make sense. Given my position, I shouldn't eat just anything...
1000615596.korean: - 소완의 말에도 일리가 있다. 내 위치가 위치인만큼, 아무거나 먹어선 안되겠지...

1000615597.english: Now that you've convinced me, I'm at a loss. Then, please go with me.
1000615597.korean: 납득해주시니 몸 둘 바를 모르겠사옵니다. 그러면 소첩과 함께 가시지요.

1000615598.english: - Sowan smiled brightly at my words.

1000615599.english: - ...so bright that the cold air blew away.

1000615600.english: ...our plans have changed. There's somewhere we need to stop before you enjoy dinner.
1000615600.korean: ...예정이 바뀌었사옵니다. 만찬을 즐기시기 전에 들려야 하실 곳이 있사옵니다.

1000615601.english: - As I asked with an ominous feeling, So-Wan's smile deepened.
1000615601.korean: - 불길한 예감을 누르며 묻자 소완의 미소가 한층 진해졌다.

1000615602.english: The filth that entered the master's stomach must be disinfected.
1000615602.korean: 주인의 위장 속으로 들어간 더러운 것을 소독해야 하옵니다.

1000615603.english: While you are washing your stomach, I will stay by your side.
1000615603.korean: 위세척을 하시는 동안 소첩이 주인의 곁을 지키겠사옵니다.

1000615605.english: - Aurora was completely terrified when Sowan shot her once.
1000615605.korean: - 아우로라는 소완이 한 번 쏘아보자 그대로 기가 죽고 말았다.

1000615606.english: Please go. You must wash it off before it is digested.
1000615606.korean: 어서 가시지요. 소화되기 전에 씻어내야 하옵니다.

1000615607.english: - Sowan reluctantly lowered her head and disappeared.

1000615608.english: Thank you... You're Sowan, right? You're much scarier than I saw in the records...
1000615608.korean: 고마워... 소완 님 맞지? 기록에서 봤던 것보다 훨씬 무섭네...

1000615609.english: - If it were like before, the knife would have come flying right away...

1000615611.english: - What should I do from now on...? I reached out to Aurora, who was feeling discouraged.
1000615611.korean: - 앞으로 나는 어떡하지... 하고 의기소침해진 아우로라에게 손을 뻗었다.

1000615612.english: - Aurora, who had been curled up with her eyes closed, carefully opened her eyes.
1000615612.korean: - 눈을 감고 몸을 잔뜩 웅크렸던 아우로라가 조심스럽게 눈을 떴다.

1000615614.english: - ...It wouldn't be strange. While I was trying to find the right words to comfort her, a notification came into the command panel.
1000615614.korean: - ...이상한 일도 아니겠지. 위로할 적당한 말을 고르던 중에 지휘 패널에 알림이 들어왔다.

1000615615.english: Ironworm... Huh? That last name is...

1000615616.english: - Aurora's eyes widened as she saw the castle spire rising in the distance in the reconnaissance unit's real-time recording footage.
1000615616.korean: - 정찰대의 실시간 기록영상에 저 멀리 떠오른 성의 첨탑을 본 아우로라의 눈이 커졌다.

1000615617.english: - It was easy to find records of Sweets & Dreams, which clearly shows that it was a famous company.
1000615617.korean: - 확실히 유명한 회사였는지 Sweets & Dreams에 대한 기록은 쉽게 찾을 수 있었다.

1000615618.english: - And since the location of the headquarters, where the ‘Choco Queen' resided, was not that far away, we decided to move there right away.
1000615618.korean: - 그리고 '초코 여왕'이 지내던, 본사라고 할 수 있는 곳의 위치가 그렇게 멀지 않아 바로 이동하기로 했다.

1000615619.english: Why? Are there so many Metal Parasites there?

1000615620.english: - Orca's equipment is not enough for all the members to make chocolate.
1000615620.korean: - 전 대원들이 초콜릿을 만들기에는 오르카의 설비로는 택도 없다.

1000615621.english: - So, I was looking for a wide area and thanks to Aurora's story, I found a suitable place.
1000615621.korean: - 그래서 넓은 곳을 알아보다가 마침 아우로라의 이야기 덕분에 적당한 장소를 찾게 됐다.

1000615622.english: - Aurora's expression became strange after hearing the circumstances.

1000615623.english: That, the one that the others are trying to give chocolate to... Commander... right?
1000615623.korean: 그, 다른 분들이 초콜릿을 주려는 건... 사령관... 인 거지?

1000615625.english: - I realized belatedly what I had said and shut my mouth.
1000615625.korean: - 뒤늦게 내가 무슨 말을 했는지 깨닫고 입을 다물었다.

1000615626.english: - Perhaps it's because I've been with the agents who always show me affection without question for so long, and I've become so shameless that I can say such things with my own mouth...
1000615626.korean: - 언제나 의심없이 애정을 보내주는 대원들과 지낸 지 오래되서일까,&n어느새 자기 입으로 이렇게 뻔뻔한 말을 할 수 있을 정도가 되어버렸구나...

1000615628.english: - Aurora's soft muttering to herself stabbed me in the heart like a knife.
1000615628.korean: - 작게 중얼거리는 아우로라의 혼잣말이 가슴에 비수가 되어 꽂혔다.

1000615630.english: - The sixth group of Metal Parasites encountered when starting the mission.
1000615630.korean: - 임무를 시작하고 여섯 번째로 만난 철충 무리.

1000615631.english: - Fighting in an area with such a low density of iron insects isn't that difficult.
1000615631.korean: - 이렇게 철충들의 밀도가 낮은 지역에서의 전투는 별로 어렵지 않습니다.

1000615632.english: - Because I can just move at high speed and avoid the gun barrels that follow my movements while taking them down one by one.
1000615632.korean: - 고속으로 기동해 제 움직임을 쫓는 총구를 피하면서 하나씩 베어넘기면 되니까요.

1000615633.english: - It's just a bit annoying to deal with the larvae that lose their host and escape.
1000615633.korean: - 단지 숙주를 잃고 빠져나가는 유충을 처리하는 것이 조금 성가실 뿐입니다.

1000615635.english: - The thrown Dirk pierced the larva that was slowly escaping from the Metal Parasite machine that was slowly ceasing to function.
1000615635.korean: - 던진 더크가 천천히 기능을 정지하는 철충 기체에서 빠져나가던 유충을 꿰뚫었습니다.

1000615636.english: - I retrieved Dirk and unconsciously reached into my pocket and took out a candy. &n It seems I've gotten used to it.
1000615636.korean: - 더크를 회수하고 저도 모르게 주머니를 뒤적여 사탕을 꺼냈습니다. &n어느새 몸에 익어버린 모양입니다.

1000615637.english: ...If you keep giving me things like this, it'll only cause trouble.

1000615638.english: - I sighed and muttered to myself, then unwrapped the candy and put it in my mouth.
1000615638.korean: - 한숨과 함께 혼잣말을 토해내고 사탕의 포장을 벗겨 입에 넣었습니다.

1000615640.english: - The tastes have never overlapped before, but when did we go full circle?
1000615640.korean: - 지금까지는 맛이 한 번도 겹친 적이 없었는데, 어느새 한 바퀴를 돈 걸까요?

1000615641.english: - As the candy melts, you can taste its sweetness. This is the first time I've tasted it since coming to Orca.
1000615641.korean: - 사탕이 녹으면서 단 맛이 느껴집니다. 이곳, 오르카에 와서 처음으로 느껴본 맛입니다.

1000615642.english: - Of course, when I was in the lab, and when I was fighting with Labiata, I didn't really care about eating.
1000615642.korean: - 연구소에 있었을 때는 물론, 라비아타와 함께 싸울 때는 먹는 것에는 별로 신경을 안썼으니까요.

1000615643.english: - And if you look at it, the commander who suddenly appeared is a very strange person.
1000615643.korean: - 그리고보면, 갑자기 나타난 사령관님은 참 이상한 인간님입니다.

1000615644.english: - Even if I make a mistake in an unexpected situation during my mission...
1000615644.korean: - 제가 임무 중에 일어난 돌발 상황에 실수를 해도...

1000615645.english: - I've never once been offended when I've told them that they need maintenance because of a defect.
1000615645.korean: - 결함때문에 정비를 받아야할 것 같다고 말씀드려도 단 한번도 저를 아프게 한 적이 없습니다.

1000615646.english: - Instead, she always puts a piece of candy in my hand.
1000615646.korean: - 그 대신, 언제나 제 손에 사탕을 하나씩 쥐어주십니다.

1000615647.english: ...Commander, this is Tiamat. I report that the mission is complete.

1000615648.english: - Is it because I'm thinking about you, Commander?

1000615649.english: - I originally planned to request communication after I finished eating the candy, but before I knew it, I was calling the Commander.
1000615649.korean: - 원래는 사탕을 다 먹고 나서 통신을 요청할 생각이었지만, 저는 어느샌가 사령관님을 부르고 있었습니다.

1000615650.english: Yeah, you worked hard. Are you hurt?

1000615652.english: - I answered carefully so as not to be caught biting the candy, and the commander smiled brightly.
1000615652.korean: - 사탕을 물고 있는 것을 들키지 않도록 신경쓰며 대답하자 사령관님은 밝게 웃어주셨습니다.

1000615653.english: Come back safely. When you have time after resting, come back and I'll give you a 'Well done' candy.
1000615653.korean: 조심해서 돌아와. 쉬고 나서 시간날 때 찾아오면 '참 잘했어요' 사탕을 줄게.

1000615655.english: - Communications were terminated and flight equipment was checked.

1000615656.english: - I checked that all functions were normal and tried to fly, but my inner feelings that I couldn't suppress came out.
1000615656.korean: - 모든 기능이 정상인 것을 확인하고 날아오르려다 미처 전부 억누르지 못한 속마음이 새어나왔습니다.

1000615658.english: - I bit the remaining piece of candy that had shrunk, kicked the ground, and jumped up, increasing my speed.
1000615658.korean: - 작아진 사탕을 마저 깨물고 땅을 박차고 뛰어올라 속도를 높였습니다.

1000615659.english: - Even when we reached the rendezvous point with the other scouts, the sweet taste of candy still lingered in our mouths.
1000615659.korean: - 다른 정찰대와의 집합지점에 도착할 때까지도 입 안엔 사탕의 달콤한 맛이 남아있었습니다.

1000615661.english: Ahaha, two cans of tuna for not wearing a skirt!
1000615661.korean: 아하하, 치마 안 입고 나온다에 참치캔 두 개!

1000615663.english: Oh, that's ridiculous. You packed it all by yourself?!
1000615663.korean: 마, 말도 안돼. 혼자서 다 챙겨입었다고?!

1000615664.english: Isn't there a hunter inside? Look where you are.
1000615664.korean: 안에 헌터 있는 거 아냐? 어디 봐봐.

1000615665.english: I'm so touched... Emily, you've grown so much...

1000615666.english: Okay, then shall we bring out the can of tuna?

1000615668.english: You... who are you? There's no way our Emily would do this...?
1000615668.korean: 너... 너 누구야? 우리 에밀리가 이럴리 없는데... ?

1000615670.english: No, no matter what, it's just too weird... Ah.
1000615670.korean: 아니, 아무리 그래도 너무 이상하니... 아.

1000615674.english: Phew. Emily, what happened to the fan... no, the little triangle dress?
1000615674.korean: 푸흡. 에밀리, 팬... 아니, 조그맣고 세모난 옷은 어떻게 했어?

1000615676.english: ...I didn't wear it because it was uncomfortable...

1000615678.english: Oh, my stomach hurts... Emily, let's just go like that. Then Commander, huh?
1000615678.korean: 아, 배아파... 에밀리, 그냥 그렇게 가자. 그러면 사령관님이크엑.

1000615680.english: Ugh, it hurts... Did I hit you too hard?
1000615680.korean: 으, 아파라... 너무 세게 때린 거 아냐?

1000615682.english: How many times have I told you? It's still too early for Emily.
1000615682.korean: 몇 번을 말하죠. 에밀리한테는 아직 이르다고.

1000615683.english: You have to learn step by step, one by one...

1000615684.english: Okay~ You're really trying to fill it 100 times like your real name.

1000615685.english: I also know that our Emily needs time.
1000615685.korean: 나도 우리 에밀리한테 시간이 필요한 거 잘 알고있다고.

1000615686.english: Hmm... I can't imagine it. Emily and the Commander...
1000615686.korean: 음... 그런데 상상이 안되긴 하네. 우리 에밀리랑 사령관님이랑...

1000615690.english: ...Emily, you must never do that in front of the Commander.
1000615690.korean: ...에밀리, 사령관님 앞에서는 절대로 그렇게 하면 안돼요.

1000615691.english: Uh, should I just wear something different? I'm starting to feel a little uneasy...
1000615691.korean: 그, 그냥 다른 옷 입을래? 나도 좀 불안해지네...

1000615694.english: Emily, your safety is paramount. You know that, right?
1000615694.korean: 에밀리, 사령관님의 안전이 무엇보다도 중요합니다. 잘 알고있죠?

1000615696.english: Well, our Emily may be a bit stubborn, but she keeps her word. Don't worry too much.
1000615696.korean: 뭐, 우리 에밀리는 맹하긴해도 말한건 잘 지키잖아. 너무 걱정하지 말라구.

1000615699.english: Heh heh, you're getting on the Zenox so naturally?

1000615701.english: Well, I'll be sure to protect the commander...

1000615706.english: I'll wait for you, Captain. You go first.

1000615707.english: Right, you're receiving the records right now, right? I want to see you soon~
1000615707.korean: 맞다, 지금 기록 전달받는 중이시지? 빨리 만나고 싶다~

1000615708.english: - Returned to Orca after joining up with other scouts.

1000615709.english: - They've probably fought as many battles as I have, but they're all just chatting away leisurely.
1000615709.korean: - 저만큼이나 많은 전투를 치뤘을테지만, 다들 한가롭게 잡담을 나누고 있습니다.

1000615710.english: - Coming to Orca... is one of the things that is difficult to understand.
1000615710.korean: - 오르카에 와서... 이해하기 힘든 일 중 하나입니다.

1000615711.english: Sigh, I'm so busy I can't believe I have to do some reconnaissance at a time like this...
1000615711.korean: 하아, 바빠 죽겠는데 이런 때에 정찰이나 해야하다니...

1000615712.english: Oh my, do you really not know why Your Majesty has entrusted us with this reconnaissance?
1000615712.korean: 어머, 폐하께서 저희에게 정찰을 맡기신 이유를 정말 모르시는 건가요?

1000615713.english: Huh, how could I not know my master's intentions?
1000615713.korean: 흥, 제가 주인님의 의도를 모를리가 있겠어요?

1000615714.english: The more dangerous the mission, the more likely you are to entrust it to our stronger team to reduce losses.
1000615714.korean: 위험한 임무일수록 강한 저희들에게 맡겨서 손실을 줄이시려는 거죠.

1000615715.english: I was just grumbling because I thought I wouldn't have time to prepare chocolate at this rate.
1000615715.korean: 이러다가 초콜릿을 준비할 시간도 없을 것 같아서 투덜거려 본 것 뿐이에요.

1000615716.english: Hey, Wang Gaseum. Have you made any plans to prepare chocolate for your master?
1000615716.korean: 이봐요, 왕가슴. 당신은 주인님을 위한 초콜릿을 준비할 계획은 제대로 세워뒀나요?

1000615717.english: Of course, it won't take that long though.

1000615720.english: You should have seen the look on His Majesty's face when he saw that dented cake...
1000615720.korean: 폐하께서 그 찌그러진 케이크를 보고 지은 표정을 당신도 봤어야 하는데...

1000615721.english: You said it was a face that looked like it was looking at a monster?

1000615723.english: Hehehe, no matter how much you criticize me, it's no use anymore.
1000615723.korean: 후훗, 이젠 아무리 그렇게 매도해봐야 소용없어요.

1000615724.english: Since Your Majesty has said it is good, it is like an honorable title to me.
1000615724.korean: 폐하께서 좋다고 말해주신 이상, 그건 제겐 명예로운 칭호같은 거니까요.

1000615725.english: Ha... I'm really not in my right mind...

1000615726.english: Of course, His Majesty says that everything about us is good, but...
1000615726.korean: 물론 폐하께선 저희들의 모든 부분을 좋다고 말씀해주시지만...

1000615727.english: That part is also manly... Haaang, Your Majesty...

1000615728.english: - I tried my best not to notice, but I glanced at her and our eyes met.
1000615728.korean: - 가급적 신경쓰지 않으려 했지만 흘깃 시선을 주었다가 눈이 마주치고 말았습니다.

1000615729.english: Oh, Miss Tiamat. We went on a sortie together, yes.
1000615729.korean: 어머, 티아멧 양. 같이 출격했었죠, 참.

1000615732.english: Even though she's a bit gloomy, she's a kid who takes care of herself.
1000615732.korean: 우중충하긴 해도 자기 앞가림은 하는 아이란거군요.

1000615733.english: Don't pay attention to what that fool says.

1000615735.english: Are you going to prepare some chocolates for His Majesty, Miss Tiamat?
1000615735.korean: 티아멧 양도 폐하께 드릴 초콜릿을 준비할 거죠?

1000615738.english: I'm sure His Majesty would be very happy if he received chocolate from Miss Tiamat?
1000615738.korean: 티아멧 양에게 초콜릿을 받으면 폐하께서도 엄청 기뻐하실 거라구요?

1000615740.english: - Even though I deny it, I realize that Charlotte is right.
1000615740.korean: - 부정하면서도 샬럿 씨의 말이 맞다는 사실을 알아버립니다.

1000615742.english: You usually get so much attention from your master, but on a day like this, you're going to wipe your mouth clean?
1000615742.korean: 평소에 주인님께 그렇게 관심을 받아놓고 정작 이런 날에는 입을 싹 닦겠다는 건가요?

1000615743.english: It's really frustrating. If you like something, you like it...

1000615744.english: There's no need to say that!

1000615745.english: - Before I knew it, the two of them started bickering over me.
1000615745.korean: - 어느새 두 분은 저를 두고 티격태격하기 시작했습니다.

1000615746.english: - I took advantage of the gap and carefully slipped out.

1000615748.english: - I've been thinking about this for a while, but I can't tell if they're on good terms or bad terms.
1000615748.korean: - 전부터 생각했지만 사이가 좋은 건지 나쁜 건지 알 수가 없는 분들입니다.

1000615750.english: - Thanks to you two, I remembered the purpose of this reconnaissance mission, which I had forgotten. &n It's a chocolate preparation operation for the Commander.
1000615750.korean: - 두 분 덕분에 잊고있던 이번 정찰임무의 목적이 떠올랐습니다. &n사령관님을 위한 초코 준비작전이라나요.

1000615751.english: - I thought it was stupid so I didn't pay attention.

1000615752.english: - I put my hand in my pocket and found that there were still a lot of candies left.
1000615752.korean: - 주머니에 손을 넣자 아직 많이 남아있는 사탕들이 손에 잡힙니다.

1000615753.english: - I ate one every time I finished a mission, but I still have this much left.
1000615753.korean: - 임무를 마칠 때마다 하나씩 먹었는데도 이만큼이나 남았습니다.

1000615754.english: - This... could be said to be the first gift the Commander gave me.
1000615754.korean: - 이건... 사령관님이 먼저 선물을 주신거라고 할 수 있겠죠.

1000615755.english: - Then I should give you some chocolate, Commander. I can't owe you anything for nothing.
1000615755.korean: - 그렇다면 저도 사령관님에게 초콜릿을 드려야합니다. 이유없이 빚을 질 수는 없으니까요.

1000615756.english: - Thinking like that somehow makes me feel better.

1000615757.english: - ...What kind of expression will the Commander make if I give him chocolate?
1000615757.korean: - ...사령관님은 제가 초콜릿을 드리면 어떤 표정을 지으실까요?

1000615758.english: - As I was walking, lost in thought, I suddenly found myself in the hallway where the captain's cabin was.
1000615758.korean: - 생각에 잠겨 걷다보니 어느새 함장실이 있는 복도입니다.

1000615759.english: - I headed to the captain's cabin, careful not to hurry my steps.
1000615759.korean: - 발걸음이 빨라지지 않도록 신경쓰며 함장실로 향했습니다.

1000615760.english: - As usual, the sound of cheerful conversation is leaking out through the slightly open door.
1000615760.korean: - 살짝 열린 문 틈으로 여느때처럼 즐거운 이야깃소리가 새어나오고 있습니다.

1000615762.english: Miss Lindwurm, His Majesty is busy.

1000615764.english: Who is Lindwurm? My name is Linty.

1000615765.english: - I peeked and saw the commander looking embarrassed, but... smiling happily.
1000615765.korean: - 몰래 엿보니 사령관님은 난처해하면서도... 즐겁게 웃고 있습니다.

1000615766.english: - I've never seen a human smile like that at a Bioroid, or a Bioroid that likes a human like that.
1000615766.korean: - 바이오로이드에게 저렇게 웃어주는 인간님도, &n인간님을 저렇게 좋아하는 바이오로이드도... 저는 본 적 없습니다.

1000615767.english: Teacher, when are we leaving? I'll make some seriously delicious chocolate!
1000615767.korean: 선생님, 저희 언제 출발해요? 엄~청 맛있는 초콜릿을 만들어 올게요!

1000615768.english: I've just secured the path, so please wait a moment.
1000615768.korean: 이제 막 경로를 확보한 참이니까 조금만 기다려줘.

1000615769.english: Okay, really? Then I'll secretly send you the meeting place and time...
1000615769.korean: 으응, 그래요? 그러면 아르망 몰래 약속 장소랑 시간을 보내드릴테니까...

1000615770.english: Until then, Linty and I... are going to play?

1000615771.english: ...You're forcing me to use my computational power for things like this.
1000615771.korean: ...기어코 이런 일에 연산 능력을 쓰게 만드시는군요.

1000615772.english: - It's chocolate again. Is it really that important?
1000615772.korean: - 또 초콜릿 이야기입니다. 그게 그렇게나 중요한 걸까요?

1000615773.english: - I remember the location and route perfectly.

1000615774.english: - Since the Orca is currently anchored, there is no need to use the sortie pod to immediately signal the Commander.
1000615774.korean: - 지금은 오르카 호가 정박중이니까 사령관님에게 바로 신호가 가는 출격포드를 이용할 필요는 없습니다.

1000615775.english: - Instead, you can just go out the regular exit and fly away.
1000615775.korean: - 대신 일반 출입구로 나가서 날아가면 되겠죠.

1000615776.english: - There will be a record, but... the Commander is busy, so unless something special comes up, he won't bother checking.
1000615776.korean: - 기록은 남겠지만... 사령관님은 바쁘시니 특별한 일이 없다면 굳이 확인하시진 않을거예요.

1000615777.english: - It has been confirmed that all personnel who went out to secure a route to the Choco Queen's territory have returned safely.
1000615777.korean: - 초코 여왕의 영지로 경로를 확보하러 나갔던 인원이 모두 무사히 귀환한 것을 확인했다.

1000615778.english: - Now, we'll deploy additional troops to clear the territory and its surroundings...
1000615778.korean: - 이제 추가 부대를 투입해 영지 내부와 주변을 정리하고...

1000615780.english: - No matter how much she can manipulate the force field, Aurora is close to being a non-combatant.
1000615780.korean: - 아무리 역장을 다룰 수 있다지만 아우로라는 비전투원에 가깝다.

1000615781.english: - Besides, it hasn't been long since it was restored, so I lack experience...
1000615781.korean: - 게다가 아직 복원된 지 얼마 되지 않아 경험도 부족하고...

1000615782.english: - While I was thinking about it, the captain's cabin door opened.
1000615782.korean: - 고민하고 있을 때 함장실 문이 열렸다.

1000615783.english: - Emily nodded, almost as if she could see me, and grabbed the hem of my clothes.
1000615783.korean: - 보일듯 말듯 고개를 끄덕인 에밀리가 내 옷자락을 잡아 끌었다.

1000615785.english: - As if answering my question, a familiar silhouette poked its face through the crack in the still open captain's cabin door.
1000615785.korean: - 내 물음에 대답하듯 아직 열려있던 함장실 문 틈으로 익숙한 실루엣이 얼굴을 들이밀었다.

1000615786.english: Yeah... Say hello to Zenox too...

1000615787.english: - Zenox, who had squeezed into the captain's cabin, stopped gently in front of my desk.
1000615787.korean: - 함장실 안으로 비집고 들어온 제녹스가 내 책상 앞에 부드럽게 멈춰섰다.

1000615788.english: - A faint smile appeared on Emily's fierce face as she greeted Zenox.
1000615788.korean: - 제녹스에게 인사를 건네자 에밀리의 맹한 얼굴에 살짝 미소가 걸렸다.

1000615789.english: I'm going to keep the promise I made last time...

1000615790.english: - My heart sank for a moment. Had I forgotten something?
1000615790.korean: - 순간 가슴이 철렁 내려앉았다. 내가 뭔가 까먹고 있었나?

1000615791.english: - Fortunately, that question was quickly resolved.

1000615792.english: Yeah... I didn't give you any chocolate last time... Let's go find it together...
1000615792.korean: 응... 저번에 초콜릿, 못 줬으니까... 같이 찾으러 가자...

1000615793.english: - I remember a letter written in crooked handwriting. Oh, so...
1000615793.korean: - 삐뚤빼뚤한 글씨로 적힌 편지가 기억난다. 아, 그래서...

1000615795.english: Choco Queen... I heard it from my sisters...

1000615796.english: - Well, I didn't plan on going myself...
1000615796.korean: - 음, 내가 직접 가려는 계획은 없었는데...

1000615797.english: - Emily, who sat down on the Zenox and looked up, didn't seem to think at all that I would refuse.
1000615797.korean: - 제녹스에 털썩 앉아 올려다보는 에밀리는 내가 거절할 거라고는 조금도 생각하지 않는 것 같다.

1000615798.english: - It might be a little dangerous to go alone with Emily, but those pranksters would definitely follow anyway.
1000615798.korean: - 에밀리와 단 둘이 가는 건 조금 위험할테지만, 어차피 그 장난치기 좋아하는 녀석들도 무조건 따라오겠지.

1000615799.english: - As I stood up, Aurora cautiously opened her mouth.
1000615799.korean: - 내가 자리에서 일어나자 아우로라가 조심스레 입을 열었다.

1000615800.english: Then can't I go with you?
1000615800.korean: 그러면 나도 같이 가면 안 돼?

1000615801.english: I can help in combat to some extent...
1000615801.korean: 전투를 보조하는 정도는 할 수 있으니까...

1000615802.english: - It would be better to have a supporting combatant rather than just moving the cannon. And to adapt more quickly...
1000615802.korean: - 캐노니어만 움직이는 것보다는 보조 전투원이 있는 게 좋긴 하겠지. 그리고 더 빨리 적응하려면...

1000615803.english: - Emily stares intently at Aurora's face as if she has just realized her presence.
1000615803.korean: - 에밀리는 이제야 존재를 깨달은 것처럼 아우로라의 얼굴을 빤히 바라보고 있다.

1000615805.english: Oh, yeah. Hi. I'm Aurora. And...
1000615805.korean: 아, 응. 안녕. 나는 아우로라야. 그리고...

1000615806.english: Hey, hello to you too, Zenox...

1000615807.english: - While I was holding back a laugh at the heartwarming sight, Emily moved slightly so that Aurora could sit down.
1000615807.korean: - 몹시 훈훈한 광경에 내가 웃음을 참는 사이 에밀리는 아우로라도 앉을 수 있도록 살짝 위치를 옮겼다.

1000615808.english: - There was almost no change in Emily's expression, but I could tell she was satisfied.
1000615808.korean: - 표정 변화는 전혀라고 해도 좋을 정도로 없었지만, &n나는 에밀리가 만족스러워하고 있다는 걸 눈치챌 수 있었다.

1000615809.english: - The three of us huddled together on top of the Zenox and moved around for a while.
1000615809.korean: - 제녹스 위에 셋이서 옹기종기 모여앉아 이동하길 얼마간.

1000615810.english: - After a few battles, Emily is sleeping comfortably against me.
1000615810.korean: - 몇 번의 전투 후에 에밀리는 너무나 편안하게 내게 기대어 잠들어있다.

1000615811.english: - Aurora has been looking at me with a strange look for a while now, as I'm holding Emily back from falling.
1000615811.korean: - 아우로라는 에밀리가 쓰러지지 않도록 붙잡아주고 있는 나를 조금 전부터 묘한 눈으로 보고 있다.

1000615813.english: - Even though my body has been enhanced with Origin Dust, it is undeniable that I am human.
1000615813.korean: - 신체가 오리진더스트로 강화됐기는 하지만 내가 인간인 것은 틀림없는 사실이니까.

1000615814.english: And... we, that is, we love Bioroids... right?
1000615814.korean: 그리고... 우리들, 그러니까 바이오로이드들을 사랑... 하는 거 맞지?

1000615815.english: - I was speechless at the unexpected question.

1000615816.english: - That's true, but asking so blatantly is a bit...
1000615816.korean: - 맞긴 하지만 이렇게 대놓고 물어보니까 조금...

1000615817.english: I see. Yeah, just like us, humans have diverse personalities...
1000615817.korean: 그렇구나. 응, 우리처럼 인간님들도 성격이 다양하니까...

1000615818.english: Commander, but when you were fighting the Metal Parasites, was the artillery fire you ordered?
1000615818.korean: 사령관, 그런데 철충들이랑 싸울때 날아오던 포격은 사령관이 명령한거야?

1000615819.english: - As expected, friendly signals were being picked up nearby as soon as we left Orca.
1000615819.korean: - 예상했던 것처럼 오르카를 나설 때부터 근처에서 아군 신호가 잡히고 있었다.

1000615820.english: - I don't think she had any intention of following me secretly from the beginning.
1000615820.korean: - 애초부터 몰래 따라올 생각은 없었던 것 같다.

1000615821.english: - Otherwise, I wouldn't have hidden my messy hair in the bushes, or screamed in the sky...
1000615821.korean: - 그렇지 않다면 북슬북슬한 머리카락을 수풀로 위장하고 숨어있거나 상공에서 꺄아꺄아 소리지르지도 않았겠지...

1000615823.english: Commander! What if you take another girl with you while dating Emily? You did a good job following me!
1000615823.korean: 사령관! 에밀리랑 데이트하면서 다른 애도 데려가면 어떻게 해! 따라오길 잘했네!

1000615824.english: Emily, this is not the time to be sleeping.

1000615825.english: Follow me. Get away from my commander, you fire fox!
1000615825.korean: 따라해봐. 내 사령관한테서 떨어져, 이 불여우!

1000615826.english: Get away from my commander... Haaam... You vixen...
1000615826.korean: 내 사령관한테서 떨어져... 하암... 이 불여우...

1000615828.english: As always, our Emily is the cutest when she just wakes up!
1000615828.korean: 역시 우리 에밀리는 방금 일어났을때가 제일 귀여워!

1000615829.english: Commander, isn't that too much? Our Emily is a solo lead actress.
1000615829.korean: 사령관님, 너무한 거 아니야? 우리 에밀리는 단독주연급이란 말이야.

1000615830.english: Still, you got the commander's shoulder, right? That's a good enough development.
1000615830.korean: 그래도 사령관 어깨는 차지했잖아? 충분히 좋은 전개라구.

1000615831.english: - The Beast Hunter, who I thought would be the first to come running, is nowhere to be seen.
1000615831.korean: - 제일 먼저 달려올 거라고 생각했던 비스트헌터가 보이지 않는다.

1000615832.english: Hunter said she would wait for the captain and come with her.

1000615835.english: - If Cannonier came, I should have thought about Royal Arsenal coming too...
1000615835.korean: - 캐노니어가 오면 로열 아스널이 올 것도 생각했어야 했는데...

1000615836.english: - No matter how many times I meet them, meeting a commander-level agent for the first time still feels burdensome.
1000615836.korean: - 몇 번을 만나도 지휘관급 대원과의 첫 대면은 여전히 부담스럽다.

1000615837.english: - How much more will I have to struggle to gain trust...
1000615837.korean: - 신뢰를 얻으려면 또 얼마나 고생해야 할지...

1000615838.english: - I remember the time I tried to feed the brownies a nice meal and got embarrassed.
1000615838.korean: - 예전에 브라우니들에게 좋은 밥을 먹여주려다가 망신당했던 기억이 떠오른다.

1000615839.english: Yeah, she'll be here soon. I can't wait~

1000615840.english: Yeah... I want to see you soon...

1000615841.english: - When I just looked at the records, I thought he would be a commander who was difficult to deal with, but judging by Emily's reaction, it seems that's not necessarily the case.
1000615841.korean: - 기록만 살펴봤을 때는 역대급으로 대하기 어려운 지휘관일거라고 생각했는데 에밀리의 반응을 보면 꼭 그렇지만은 않은 모양이다.

1000615842.english: - ...Just in case, I guess I'll have to ask the Cannoniers to explain it to me.
1000615842.korean: - ...그래도 혹시 모르니 캐노니어들에게 잘 좀 말해달라고 부탁을 좀 해야겠군.

1000615844.english: Captain, are you joining us now? Captain?

1000615847.english: It is a little, no, a lot different from the appearance of the unit members as reported in the records.
1000615847.korean: 기록으로 전달받은 부대원들의 모습과는 조금, 아니 많이 다르다.

1000615851.english: It's understandable that you'd want to cherish the Emily model. &n While somewhat unstable, it's still one of our unit's strongest firepower.
1000615851.korean: 에밀리 모델을 아끼는 것은 이해할 수 있다. &n다소 불안정하기는 해도 우리 부대 최강의 화력 중 하나니까.

1000615852.english: But it's hard to accept that she's so intimate with the commander who holds the power.
1000615852.korean: 하지만 통수권자인 사령관에게 저렇게까지 친밀한 모습을 보이는 건 받아들이기 어렵군.

1000615854.english: Sorry, I was just thinking about the past.

1000615855.english: I've had the same thoughts as you, sir.
1000615855.korean: 저도 대장님과 같은 생각을 했던 적이 있습니다.

1000615856.english: You too, Captain, will soon... understand.

1000615857.english: - Finally, we arrived at the Chocolate Queen's castle and stepped into the courtyard.
1000615857.korean: - 마침내 초코 여왕의 성에 도착해 안뜰에 발을 디뎠다.

1000615858.english: - There was a minor incident along the way where Emily blew up the gate with Zenox...
1000615858.korean: - 도중에 에밀리가 제녹스로 성문을 날려버리는 사소한 사건이 있었지만...

1000615859.english: - I didn't even think of criticizing her as she turned around with a look that only I and the Canons could recognize, a look that asked for praise.
1000615859.korean: - 나와 캐노니어들만 알아볼 수 있는, 칭찬해달라는 표정을 지으며 돌아보는 모습에 나무랄 생각도 들지 않았다.

1000615860.english: - The courtyard of the castle that I entered was more amazing than I had imagined.
1000615860.korean: - 그렇게 들어선 성의 안뜰은 상상한 것 이상으로 놀라웠다.

1000615862.english: Oh my god... is this possible?

1000615864.english: - As Raven said, everything from the fountain to the trees was a paradise of sweets.
1000615864.korean: - 레이븐의 말대로 분수대부터 나무까지 온통 단 것들 천지였다.

1000615865.english: - Indeed, she deserves to be called the Chocolate Queen...

1000615866.english: Hey, Emily! Where are you going alone?

1000615869.english: Commander, we'll take care of Emily~
1000615869.korean: 사령관님, 우린 에밀리 좀 챙기고 있을게~

1000615870.english: Ahaha... she looks just like a kitten.
1000615870.korean: 아하하... 쟤는 꼭 새끼 고양이 같네.

1000615871.english: "That's an accurate expression. Seeing you wandering around the courtyard with such a curious face...
1000615871.korean: - 정확한 표현이군. 호기심 가득한 얼굴로 안뜰을 돌아다니는 걸 보면...

1000615872.english: Well... I don't remember working here now, but for some reason it feels comfortable.
1000615872.korean: 글쎄... 여기서 일한 기억은 지금의 내겐 없지만, 왠지 편안한 느낌이 들어.

1000615873.english: - Aurora swept the castle pillars with a hazy face.
1000615873.korean: - 아우로라는 아련한 얼굴로 성의 기둥을 쓸었다.

1000615874.english: But hasn't it been over 100 years? It's...still fine.
1000615874.korean: 그런데 100년도 넘게 지나지 않았어? 되게... 멀쩡하네.

1000615875.english: - Looking at the things left behind by humanity before its destruction, I was able to discover one rule.
1000615875.korean: - 지금껏 멸망 전의 인류가 남긴 것들을 봐오며 한가지 법칙을 찾을 수 있었다.

1000615876.english: - The wealth and power of the people living there are inversely proportional to the degree of destruction in the area.
1000615876.korean: - 바로 그곳에 살던 인간의 재산과 권력이 구역의 파괴도와 반비례 한다는 것.

1000615877.english: - While the poor were massacred without being able to escape when the Metal Parasite poured down,
1000615877.korean: - 가난한 이들이 철충들이 쏟아져 내려왔을때 미처 대피하지 못한채 학살당하는동안,

1000615878.english: - It is not difficult to imagine those in power quickly escaping through their own routes.
1000615878.korean: - 권력자들은 각자의 루트를 통해 빠르게 대피하는 모습이 머릿속에 어렵지않게 그려진다.

1000615879.english: Commander! I found the best room!

1000615881.english: - As expected, there are still AGSs left for security and maintenance.

1000615883.english: Don't worry, I'll help you later!

1000615887.english: Here we come! I'll hold you back, so get in line!

1000615888.english: - The familiar sounds of battle are heard from the courtyard.

1000615889.english: - I looked outside and saw the cannoniers fighting noisily.
1000615889.korean: - 밖을 내다보니 캐노니어 분들이 요란하게 전투를 벌이고 있습니다.

1000615890.english: - I knew additional troops would be deployed a little later... Did the plans change?
1000615890.korean: - 추가 부대가 투입되는 것은 조금 더 뒤로 알고 있었는데... 계획이 바뀐 걸까요?

1000615891.english: - But the Canons' movements are a bit strange.

1000615893.english: - At first glance, it looks like she's being playful, but if you look closely, you'll see that she's moving carefully as if she's guarding something.
1000615893.korean: - 언뜻 보기엔 장난스럽게 임하는 것 같지만, 자세히 살펴보면 무언가를 지키듯 신중하게 움직이고 있습니다.

1000615896.english: - The commander is giving orders from cover.

1000615897.english: - It was definitely not planned for the Commander to come in person...
1000615897.korean: - 분명 사령관님이 직접 오시는 건 계획에 없었는데...

1000615898.english: - I was confused by the sudden situation, but I was able to come to my senses quickly.
1000615898.korean: - 돌발상황에 혼란에 빠졌지만, 저 치고는 금방 정신을 차릴 수 있었습니다.

1000615899.english: - The Commander's actions are simply unpredictable. It's only natural that they'd be wrong if we were to judge them by conventional standards.
1000615899.korean: - 사령관님의 행동은 도저히 종잡을 수 없으니까요. 일반적인 척도로 생각하면 틀리는 것도 당연합니다.

1000615900.english: - In that brief moment, I think, the situation was over.
1000615900.korean: - 제가 생각하는 그 잠깐 사이에 상황은 금방 종료되었습니다.

1000615901.english: - The commander, who had been chatting with others for a while, soon walked into the castle.
1000615901.korean: - 다른 분들과 잠시 이야기를 나누던 사령관님은 이내 성 안으로 걸음을 옮겼습니다.

1000615903.english: - Only then did I look around the messy kitchen.

1000615904.english: - If the Commander sees this, he will definitely think I am an ugly child.
1000615904.korean: - 이걸 보시면 사령관님은 저를 못미더운 아이라고 생각하실 게 분명합니다.

1000615906.english: - In the middle of the messy kitchen, there is a lump of ugly chocolate that was barely made.
1000615906.korean: - 어질러진 주방 가운데에 간신히 만들어낸 못생긴 초콜릿이 덩그러니 놓여있습니다.

1000615907.english: - I don't think the Commander will be happy if I give him something like this.
1000615907.korean: - 이런 걸 드려봤자 사령관님은 기뻐하지 않으시겠죠.

1000615908.english: - The Commander always eats only the luxurious and high-quality food prepared by Sowan.
1000615908.korean: - 사령관님은 언제나 소완 씨가 만든 호화롭고 고급스러운 요리만 드시니까요.

1000615910.english: - I've gathered all the messy wrapping paper and ruined chocolate. I need to take care of it before the Commander sees it.
1000615910.korean: - 어질러진 포장지와 망친 초콜릿을 한 데 그러모았습니다. 사령관님이 보시기 전에 처리해야 합니다.

1000615911.english: - ...Because I can't show you that I'm failing.

1000615912.english: [c][57e137]At the same time, the commander entered the castle[-][/c]

1000615913.english: - After the battle, we entered the castle.

1000615914.english: - As expected, the best room Raven mentioned seemed to be the Choco Queen's room.
1000615914.korean: - 예상한대로 레이븐이 말한 가장 좋은 방은 초코 여왕의 방인 것 같았다.

1000615915.english: - It is a room so large and luxurious that it is meaningless to compare it to the captain's room.
1000615915.korean: - 함장실과는 비교하는 것이 무의미할 정도로 크고 호화로운 방이다.

1000615916.english: - While I was watching in a daze, Emily, who had disappeared somewhere with the other unit members, came into the room.
1000615916.korean: - 넋 놓고 구경하고 있을 때 다른 부대원들과 함께 어디론가 사라졌었던 에밀리가 방으로 들어왔다.

1000615917.english: Commander... I'm going to go make some chocolate now...
1000615917.korean: 사령관... 나 이제 초콜릿 만들러 갈게...

1000615918.english: - I thought you'd just give me something... but I'm a little touched.
1000615918.korean: - 그냥 적당히 구해서 줄 줄 알았는데... 조금 감동인걸.

1000615919.english: - When I tried to call Aurora, who had already left to go look around the castle, Emily shook her head slightly.
1000615919.korean: - 성을 둘러보고싶다고 먼저 헤어진 아우로라를 호출하려고 하자 에밀리는 작게 고개를 저었다.

1000615920.english: It's okay... I decided to do it with my sisters...

1000615921.english: Commander, you can't come out here... My sisters said that the chocolate... had to be prepared secretly...
1000615921.korean: 사령관은 여기서 나오면 안 돼... 언니들이 초코는... 몰래 준비해야하는 거랬으니까...

1000615922.english: - I'm not sure what she was secretly talking about now, but Emily continued speaking with great seriousness.
1000615922.korean: - 이제와서 뭐가 몰래인지는 잘 모르겠지만 에밀리는 세상 진지하게 말을 이었다.

1000615923.english: If you get caught by the person who gave you the chocolate... the chocolate won't taste good...
1000615923.korean: 줄 사람한테 들키면... 초코가 맛이 없어진댔어...

1000615925.english: - Emily nodded and closed the door.
1000615925.korean: - 에밀리는 고개를 꾸벅 숙이고는 문을 닫았다.

1000615926.english: - I looked around the room again and my heart calmed down.
1000615926.korean: - 다시 방을 돌아보자 새삼 마음이 가라앉았다.

1000615927.english: - From my experience so far, in such a luxurious place...
1000615927.korean: - 지금까지의 경험상, 이런 호화로운 곳엔 분명히...

1000615928.english: - As I was about to sit down on the sofa, my gaze fell on the panel of my desk when I heard an ominous sound outside the door.
1000615928.korean: - 소파에 앉으려다 집무용 책상의 패널에 시선이 가는 순간 문 밖에서 불길한 소리가 들렸다.

1000615929.english: - It's like a chain being wrapped around a doorknob...
1000615929.korean: - 철그럭 철그럭 하고, 마치 문고리에 쇠사슬을 칭칭 감는 것 같은...

1000615930.english: - I ran over and pulled the door, but it didn't budge.
1000615930.korean: - 황급히 달려가 문을 당겨봤지만 꼼짝도 하지 않는다.

1000615931.english: I want to give the Commander some delicious chocolate...

1000615933.english: Emily, what are you doing... Phew! This is a masterpiece!
1000615933.korean: 에밀리, 뭐하고 있... 푸하하하핫! 이거 걸작인데?

1000615934.english: Did you really do it? That's awesome!

1000615935.english: Yeah... I'm going to go make some chocolate now...

1000615936.english: Okay, let's go. Commander, I'll make you some really delicious chocolate, so just wait quietly.
1000615936.korean: 그래, 어서 가자. 사령관, 아주 맛있~는 초콜릿을 만들어 올 테니까 얌전히 기다리고 있어~

1000615937.english: - The sound of Fanny and Raven holding their bellies and laughing faded away.
1000615937.korean: - 파니와 레이븐이 배를 잡고 웃는 소리가 멀어졌다.

1000615938.english: - I've been fooled by them more than once, but I let my guard down. How could I have taken advantage of Emily so cowardly...
1000615938.korean: - 둘에게 골탕을 먹은 적이 한 두번이 아닌데도 방심하고 말았다. 비겁하게 에밀리를 이용하다니...

1000615939.english: - Of course, I don't get angry or anything. Even pranks like this are ultimately proof of trust.
1000615939.korean: - 당연하지만 화가 나거나 하지는 않는다. 이런 장난도 결국 신뢰의 증거라고 할 수 있으니까.

1000615941.english: - I gave up on escaping cleanly and decided to look around the room once more.
1000615941.korean: - 탈출은 깔끔하게 포기하고 방을 다시 한 번 둘러보기로 했다.

1000615942.english: - I turned on the panel on the desk, half in doubt, and unexpectedly the power came on.
1000615942.korean: - 반신반의하며 책상에 놓인 패널을 켜자 뜻밖에도 전원이 들어왔다.

1000615943.english: - It seems like the previous owner didn't have time to delete the data, so it's still there as it was.
1000615943.korean: - 미처 데이터를 삭제할 시간은 없었는지 전 주인이 쓰던 그대로 남아있는 것 같다.

1000615944.english: - I rested my chin on the desk and looked through the panel.
1000615944.korean: - 책상에 턱을 괴고 패널을 적당히 뒤적거려보았다.

1000615945.english: - Most of them are dessert recipes. They're so vast that it feels like they've collected every recipe in the world.
1000615945.korean: - 대부분은 디저트 레시피군. 이 세상 모든 레시피를 모아둔 게 아닐까 싶을 정도로 방대한 양이다.

1000615946.english: - I opened various documents as they came into view and frowned without realizing it.
1000615946.korean: - 눈에 보이는대로 이것저것 문서를 열어보다 나도 모르게 눈살을 찌푸렸다.

1000615947.english: - The sentence [In stock: 7 Aurora models] written clearly.
1000615947.korean: - 선명하게 적힌 [ 재고: 아우로라 기종 7ea ] 라는 문장.

1000615948.english: - And below that, the names and current status of the Bioroids who probably worked at the company are written in a row.
1000615948.korean: - 그리고 그 아래로 줄줄이, 아마 회사에서 일했을 바이오로이드들의 이름과 현황이 적혀있다.

1000615949.english: - As I straightened my posture and began to look through the relevant documents, I began to see glimpses of Queen Choco's attitude toward the Bioroids.
1000615949.korean: - 자세를 바로하고 관련 문서들을 훑어보기 시작하자 초코 여왕이 바이오로이드들을 대하던 태도를 알 수 있는 편린들이 속속 눈에 들어왔다.

1000615950.english: - Inventory, discarded, lost, damaged... Words that are completely inappropriate for a human are attached to the names of Bioroids as if it were natural.
1000615950.korean: - 재고, 용도폐기, 손실, 훼손... 인격체에게는 전혀 어울리지 않는 단어들이 당연하다는 듯 바이오로이드들의 이름 뒤에 붙어있다.

1000615951.english: - Fortunately or unfortunately, I searched thoroughly but couldn't find anything more than that.
1000615951.korean: - 다행인지 불행인지, 샅샅이 뒤져봤지만 그 이상은 찾을 수 없었다.

1000615952.english: - As I was about to turn off the panel with a sinking feeling, a document caught my eye.
1000615952.korean: - 가라앉은 기분으로 패널을 꺼버리려고 할 때, 한 문서가 눈길을 사로잡았다.

1000615953.english: - As Aurora said, she must have been quite self-conscious.
1000615953.korean: - 아우로라의 말대로 어지간히 자의식이 강한 녀석이었나보군.

1000615954.english: - As I was about to open the document, grumbling inwardly, I heard the sound of chains clinking outside the door.
1000615954.korean: - 속으로 빈정거리며 문서를 열려고 할 때 문 밖에서 쇠사슬이 철그럭 거리는 소리가 들렸다.

1000615957.english: - Royal Arsenal entered the room, frowned, and placed the chain on the floor.
1000615957.korean: - 방으로 들어온 로열 아스널은 인상을 찌푸리며 바닥에 쇠사슬을 내려놓았다.

1000615958.english: Have my men just captured the Commander-in-Chief?

1000615959.english: I can't believe it. I'll take appropriate action immediately.
1000615959.korean: 믿을 수가 없군. 바로 합당한 처분을 내리겠다.

1000615960.english: - Royal Arsenal looked at me silently, as if demanding an answer.
1000615960.korean: - 로열 아스널은 대답을 요구하듯 말없이 나를 바라봤다.

1000615961.english: - Strictly speaking, if we apply the old military law, it won't end with just disciplinary action.
1000615961.korean: - 엄밀히 따지면, 정확히는 예전의 군법을 적용한다면 그냥 징계로 끝날일은 아니긴 하다.

1000615962.english: - But if I were to go into that, the number of people safe in Orca wouldn't even be in the double digits.
1000615962.korean: - 하지만 내가 그런 걸 따졌다면 오르카에서 무사할 인원은 두자릿수도 안되겠지.

1000615963.english: - It's all an expression of friendliness, and in reality, all assigned tasks are carried out with certainty.
1000615963.korean: - 전부 친근감의 표현이고, 실제로 맡은 바 임무는 모두 확실하게 처리하고 있다.

1000615964.english: - Royal Arsenal, who had been listening to me quietly, nodded.
1000615964.korean: - 내 말을 조용히 듣고 있던 로열 아스널이 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000615965.english: Well, if that's what the Commander thinks, then there's nothing we can do.
1000615965.korean: 흠, 사령관의 생각이 그렇다면 어쩔 수 없군.

1000615966.english: - I felt confident after seeing how easily she accepted it compared to her initial momentum.
1000615966.korean: - 처음의 기세에 비해 순순히 납득하는 것을 보고 확신이 들었다.

1000615967.english: - Although many parts were omitted, Royal Arsenal laughed as if it was natural.
1000615967.korean: - 많은 부분이 생략된 말이었지만 로열 아스널은 당연하다는듯 웃었다.

1000615968.english: Sorry. It seems like I just tried it out.
1000615968.korean: 미안하다. 졸지에 시험해 본 것처럼 됐군.

1000615969.english: - I was curious because it was different from the character of Royal Arsenal that I had seen in the records before.
1000615969.korean: - 앞서 내가 기록에서 보았던 로열 아스널의 성격과는 달라서 의아했었다.

1000615970.english: - Then the answer is one of two things. Either there was a problem with the restoration process, or...
1000615970.korean: - 그렇다면 답은 둘 중 하나. 복원 과정에 문제가 있었거나...

1000615972.english: And let me confess, you're not the only one who knew first.
1000615972.korean: 그리고 하나 고백하자면, 먼저 알고 있었던 것은 그대만이 아니다.

1000615973.english: Yes. On my way here, I saw you and Emily and heard about this and that.
1000615973.korean: 그렇다. 이곳으로 오는 길에 그대와 에밀리의 모습을 보고 이것저것 들었지.

1000615974.english: It's not that I don't trust my men, but as a commander, I have to check it out myself.
1000615974.korean: 내 부대원들을 못 믿는 건 아니지만, 그래도 지휘관으로서 직접 확인은 해봐야 하니까.

1000615975.korean: - 로열 아스널은 씩 웃으며 너스레를 떨었다.

1000615976.english: - It's still difficult to deal with...

1000615977.english: Whatever my intentions, I've been rude. Will you forgive me?
1000615977.korean: 의도야 어찌됐든 무례를 범하고 말았군. 용서해주겠나?

1000615978.english: - Royal Arsenal nodded and suddenly stopped walking as she walked out of the room.
1000615978.korean: - 고개를 끄덕인 로열 아스널이 방 밖으로 나가다 문득 걸음을 멈췄다.

1000615979.english: Oh, can I ask you one more thing?

1000615980.english: I've heard your commanding ability is truly remarkable. And...
1000615980.korean: 그대의 지휘 능력은 정말 대단하다고 들었다. 그리고...

1000615981.english: They say that at night it's incomparable to that. Is that true?
1000615981.korean: 밤에는 그것과 비교도 안 될 정도라고들 하던데, 사실인가?

1000615982.english: - I have accumulated too much experience to be flustered by something like this.
1000615982.korean: - 고작 이정도에 당황하기엔 그동안 나에게 쌓인 경험치가 너무 많다.

1000615983.english: Hahahaha! Wow, I've met a truly amazing boss. I'm really looking forward to the future.
1000615983.korean: 하하하하! 이거, 정말 대단한 상관을 만나버렸군. 앞으로가 정말 기대돼.

1000615984.english: I ask you to take care of me again. On the battlefield and in the bedroom.
1000615984.korean: 다시 한 번 잘 부탁한다. 전장에서도, 침실에서도 말이야.

1000615985.english: - After Royal Arsenal disappeared out of the room, I collapsed onto the sofa by the window.
1000615985.korean: - 로열 아스널이 방문 밖으로 사라지고 나서 창가의 소파에 털썩 주저앉았다.

1000615986.english: - I never thought such a side would be hidden behind her innocent appearance...
1000615986.korean: - 청순한 외모에 이런 면이 숨겨져 있을 줄은...

1000615987.english: - I sighed and looked out the window at the metallic sound I heard outside.
1000615987.korean: - 한숨을 돌리다 밖에서 들리는 금속성에 창문을 내다보았다.

1000615988.english: - There's no mistaking that small frame, the large flying machine, and the greatsword.
1000615988.korean: - 저 작은 체구, 그리고 커다란 비행장비와 대검을 잘못 볼리는 없다.

1000615989.english: - I was trying to call in puzzlement when I saw what Tiamat was holding in her arms.
1000615989.korean: - 의아해하며 통신을 걸려다 티아멧이 품에 안고 있는 것들이 보였다.

1000615990.english: - It looks like there were a lot of failed attempts, with a bunch of colorful wrapping paper and unusable materials.
1000615990.korean: - 많이 실패한 모양인지 알록달록한 포장지와 못 쓰게 된 재료들이 한아름.

1000615991.english: - The image of Tiamat struggling to make chocolate on her own is vivid.
1000615991.korean: - 혼자서 어떻게든 초콜릿을 만들려고 애쓰는 티아멧의 모습이 눈에 선하다.

1000615992.english: - Many of our Orca members have suffered terrible pasts, but Tiamat is particularly scarred.
1000615992.korean: - 우리 오르카엔 끔찍한 과거를 겪은 대원들이 많이 있지만, 티아멧은 그중에서도 특히 상처가 크다.

1000615993.english: - I've been trying to at least keep the wound from getting worse, even if it hasn't healed, and finally...
1000615993.korean: - 그 상처를 아물게 해주지는 못하더라도 최소한 덧나지는 않도록 신경써왔었는데,&n드디어...

1000615994.english: - Tiamat, who was walking around frantically, must have touched something when one or two colorful AGS appeared around her.
1000615994.korean: - 정신없이 주위를 둘러보며 걷던 티아멧이 무언가를 건드렸는지 주위에서 알록달록한 AGS가 하나 둘 나타났다.

1000615995.english: - I was trying to connect right away... but I gave up.

1000615996.english: - I connected the communication with Aurora, who was looking around the castle instead of Tiamat.
1000615996.korean: - 티아멧 대신 성 안을 둘러보고 있을 아우로라에게 통신을 연결했다.

1000615997.english: - I was so absorbed in the surrounding scenery that I almost got hit by a Seljuk model's bullet.
1000615997.korean: - 주위의 풍경에 정신을 팔고 있던 바람에 하마터면 셀주크 모델의 직사에 직격당할 뻔 했습니다.

1000615998.english: - Why on earth are there weapons like that here? They're all so colorful...
1000615998.korean: - 도대체 이곳에는 왜 저런 병기까지 있는 걸까요? 색도 알록달록하고...

1000615999.english: - I confirmed that all AGS had stopped moving and destroyed the circuits one by one.
1000615999.korean: - AGS들이 전부 움직임을 멈춘 것을 확인하고 회로를 하나하나 파괴했습니다.

1000616001.english: - After finishing the confirmation kill and equipment check, I sat down on a nearby bench.
1000616001.korean: - 확인사살과 장비 점검까지 끝마치고 근처의 벤치에 앉았습니다.

1000616002.english: - A strangely shaped tree, a fountain... Is that, is that chocolate?
1000616002.korean: - 신기하게 생긴 나무에, 분수대... 저, 저건 혹시 초콜릿일까요?

1000616003.english: - I went over and took a bite. It was definitely chocolate.
1000616003.korean: - 다가가서 한 입 찍어먹어 보았습니다. 틀림없는 초콜릿입니다.

1000616005.english: - Let's take a look around the garden again. It's like a whole new world that we hadn't seen before.
1000616005.korean: - 새삼스레 다시 정원을 둘러보자 방금 전까지는 보이지 않았던 별세계같습니다.

1000616006.english: - I forgot to clean up and wandered around here and there without realizing it.
1000616006.korean: - 정리하는 것도 잊고 저도 모르게 이곳저곳을 기웃거렸습니다.

1000616007.english: - The more I look, the more amazing things become...

1000616008.english: - My excited heart subsided like a lie.

1000616009.english: - This is also... a landscape created by humans torturing our Bioroids.
1000616009.korean: - 이것도 어차피... 인간님들이 저희 바이오로이드들을 혹사해 만들어낸 풍경이겠죠.

1000616010.english: - I know because I have seen and heard it countless times while I was at the lab.
1000616010.korean: - 연구소에 있는 동안 수도없이 보고, 들어왔으니까 알 수 있습니다.

1000616011.english: - Scattered on the floor are wrappers and failed chocolates that were dropped in the hasty evasion.
1000616011.korean: - 바닥에는 급히 회피하느라 놓쳐버린 포장지와 실패한 초콜릿들이 흩어져 있습니다.

1000616012.english: - Perhaps... we weren't just this kind of being to humans?
1000616012.korean: - 아마... 인간님들에게 저희는 이정도의 존재가 아니었을까요?

1000616013.english: Haa, haa... B, is it over already?

1000616014.english: - This is the person who was protecting the Commander when the Cannoniers were fighting earlier.
1000616014.korean: - 아까 캐노니어 분들이 전투할 때 사령관님을 지키고 있던 분입니다.

1000616015.english: - The unnamed member, who had been looking at the remains of the AGS for a while and exclaiming "Wow" and "Huh," cautiously approached me.
1000616015.korean: - 한동안 AGS들의 잔해를 살펴보며 우와, 헤에 하고 감탄사를 내던 이름모를 대원분은 조심스럽게 제게 다가왔습니다.

1000616016.english: Ah, hello. Commander... Oh, no. I thought you were fighting, so I came to help... Uh.
1000616016.korean: 아, 안녕. 사령... 아,아니. 싸우는 것 같길래 도와주러 왔... 어.

1000616017.english: - I stopped talking abruptly, but that was enough to tell the truth.
1000616017.korean: - 황급히 말을 멈췄지만 그정도로도 충분히 알 수 있었습니다.

1000616018.english: Did the commander ask you to help?

1000616020.english: - It seems the Commander has finally realized I'm here.
1000616020.korean: - 사령관님은 결국 제가 여기 있단 걸 알아채신 모양입니다.

1000616021.english: - And after seeing me fight... you must have sent this person.
1000616021.korean: - 그리고 제가 전투하는 모습을 보고... 이 분을 보내셨겠죠.

1000616022.english: - Because I have refused all direct combat command up until now.
1000616022.korean: - 직접적인 전투 지휘는 그동안 전부 거절했었으니까요.

1000616023.english: - As I was trying to calm down the feeling that felt like it was stabbing me deep in my chest, the unknown Bioroid spoke to me again.
1000616023.korean: - 가슴 깊은 곳을 쿡쿡 찌르는 것 같은 기분을 애써 가라앉히려는 제게 이름모를 바이오로이드분이 다시 말을 걸었습니다.

1000616025.english: I've already been caught, but... won't you come with me?
1000616025.korean: 이미 들켜버렸지만... 나랑 같이 다니지 않을래?

1000616026.english: This is where our aircraft used to work, so the approximate location information is already entered. And...
1000616026.korean: 여긴 예전에 우리 기종이 일하던 곳이라 대략적인 위치 정보는 입력되어 있거든. 그리고...

1000616027.english: - Aurora looked at the ugly chocolate I was holding in my arms.
1000616027.korean: - 아우로라 씨는 제가 품에 안고 있는 못생긴 초콜릿에 시선을 주었습니다.

1000616028.english: I'm a pastry chef, so I can help you make chocolate too.
1000616028.korean: 나, 파티시에르니까 초콜릿 만드는 것도 도와줄 수 있어.

1000616029.english: ...It's okay. I can do it by myself.

1000616030.english: - Since the Commander already knows, there's no need to be careful.
1000616030.korean: - 이미 사령관님이 알아버린 이상 조심할 필요는 없겠죠.

1000616031.english: - Before Aurora could catch it, it kicked off the ground and flew up.
1000616031.korean: - 아우로라 씨가 붙잡기 전에 땅을 박차고 날아올랐습니다.

1000616032.english: Sorry, I think I got caught. I made a mistake...
1000616032.korean: 미안해, 들켜버린 것 같아. 내가 말실수해서...

1000616033.english: - I think Tiamat would have noticed even if Aurora hadn't made a slip of the tongue.
1000616033.korean: - 아우로라가 말실수를 하지 않았더라도 티아멧은 알아차렸을 거라고 생각한다.

1000616034.english: - Because she's a child who's sensitive to all kinds of approaches from others, not just me...
1000616034.korean: - 나 뿐만 아니라 타인의 모든 접근에 예민한 아이니까...

1000616035.english: I'm not sure... but it seemed like she was hesitating.
1000616035.korean: 잘은 모르지만... 망설이고 있는 것 같았어.

1000616036.english: - I think it's a good sign.

1000616037.english: - Until now, all I could do for Tiamat, who had firmly closed her heart, was give her candy, but from now on, I will...
1000616037.korean: - 지금까진 마음의 문을 굳게 닫고 있는 티아멧에게 내가 해줄 수 있는 거라곤 기껏해야 사탕을 주는 것 뿐이었지만 앞으로는 좀 더...

1000616038.english: Hey, Commander. How did you open it?!

1000616039.english: My sister told me to be quiet...

1000616041.english: Of course not... We're the only ones here...

1000616044.english: You said Aurora, right? Help us!

1000616045.english: Oh, do we have to fight?

1000616046.english: There's no way I'd ask for something like that. With the captain here, our Cannoniers are the best!
1000616046.korean: 그런걸 부탁할리가 없잖아. 대장님까지 있으면 우리 캐노니어는 최강이라고~

1000616048.english: Our Emily is trying to make chocolate for the Commander, but we're all a bit clumsy...
1000616048.korean: 우리 에밀리가 사령관한테 초콜릿을 만들어 주려는데 아무래도 우리 다 서툴러서...

1000616049.english: - Raven, not paying attention to my nagging, grabbed Aurora's hand.
1000616049.korean: - 내 딴죽에도 아랑곳하지 않고 레이븐은 아우로라의 손을 덥석 잡았다.

1000616050.english: Oh, yeah! I'm confident about this. Feel free to leave it to me.
1000616050.korean: 으, 응! 이건 자신 있어. 얼마든지 맡겨줘.

1000616051.english: - Unfortunately, Aurora's confident appearance did not last long.
1000616051.korean: - 애석하게도 아우로라의 자신있는 모습은 얼마가지 못했다.

1000616052.english: - The moment the two were about to leave the room, a call came in from Fanny.
1000616052.korean: - 둘이 방을 나가려는 순간, 파니에게 통신이 들어왔다.

1000616053.english: Commander, there are more AGS over here!

1000616054.english: What, what is that? There's a self-propelled gun?!

1000616056.english: It's quite large for a security guard, isn't it?

1000616057.english: Okay, let's go. Let's finish this quickly and make some chocolate.
1000616057.korean: 자, 가자. 얼른 해치우고 초콜릿 만들어야지.

1000616059.english: - Aurora was dragged away by Raven with a sad face.

1000616060.english: Oh, Emily! If you put that much in...!

1000616061.english: I want to make it big...

1000616062.english: Ahaha, then should I add more? Okay...

1000616064.english: Sigh... If this continues, I'll end up not just a chocolate bar, but a chocolate monster.
1000616064.korean: 하아... 이러다간 초콜릿이 아니라 초코 괴물이 되어버리겠어요.

1000616067.english: If you're going to make a chocolate monster, you should add more! Here, here.
1000616067.korean: 기왕 초코 괴물을 만들거면 더 넣어야지! 자, 여기.

1000616069.english: Well... now we need to boil the water and double boiler it.
1000616069.korean: 음... 이제 물을 끓여서 중탕해야 합니다.

1000616070.english: It seems like it's going to overflow. Let's change it to something a little bigger.
1000616070.korean: 넘칠 것 같은데? 좀 더 큰 걸로 바꾸자.

1000616071.english: Oh, there's a huge frame here too!
1000616071.korean: 오, 여기 엄청 큰 틀도 있다!

1000616073.english: Okay, okay. And since I've switched to a larger pot, I'll add more whipped cream and chocolate...
1000616073.korean: 그래그래. 그리고 이왕 큰 냄비로 바꿨으니까, 생크림이랑 초콜릿도 더 넣고...

1000616074.english: Emily, put some nuts in there too.

1000616075.english: I guess it will have to be next year.

1000616076.english: How are you doing? It seems like there aren't any enemies around you.
1000616076.korean: 잘 하고 있어? 주변에 적은 더 없는 것 같아.

1000616078.english: Um, um... I think there are more nuts than chocolate right now...
1000616078.korean: 저, 저기... 지금 초콜릿보다 견과류가 더 많은 것 같은데...

1000616080.english: The pot is too small for that. Pani, don't you have a bigger one?
1000616080.korean: 그러기엔 냄비가 너무 작아. 파니, 더 큰 거 없어?

1000616081.english: Wait a minute~ I'm looking for it~

1000616083.english: Wouldn't something a little bigger be better? Let's see...
1000616083.korean: 그거보다 좀 더 큰 게 좋지 않을까? 어디보자...

1000616085.english: ...I'm sorry. I'll do my best to help...

1000616087.english: Ugh... what should I do with that... I should have come right after the battle ended...
1000616087.korean: 으... 저걸 어떻게하지... 전투가 끝나고 바로 왔었어야 했는데...

1000616088.english: Truffle...? Penny... Put this in too...?

1000616090.english: Okay, keep stirring. Oh, that's baking powder!
1000616090.korean: 이, 일단 계속 저어주세요. 으앗, 그건 베이킹파우더에요!

1000616094.english: Thank you. I survived thanks to you.

1000616096.english: It seems like the same expression as usual...?

1000616097.english: When you spend a long time together, you somehow manage to recognize each other. Commander, you've been recognizing each other for a while now.
1000616097.korean: 오래 함께 지내다보면 왠지 모르게 알아볼 수 있습니다. 사령관님도 얼마 전부터 알아보시더군요.

1000616098.english: I see... So the Commander is close with Emily?

1000616099.english: Hmm, I guess I should say we're close. He feels like a guardian...
1000616099.korean: 흠, 친하다고 해야할까요. 보호자 같은 느낌입니다만...

1000616100.english: Weren't you the ones who protected him? The commander said so. He said he cherished you dearly...
1000616100.korean: 보호자는 너희 아니었어? 사령관이 그랬어. 끔찍하게 아낀다고...

1000616101.english: That's true, but we're more of a family. A family centered around Emily.
1000616101.korean: 그것도 맞지만, 저희는 가족에 가깝습니다. 에밀리를 중심으로 한 가족이죠.

1000616102.english: And the Commander has created a place for us to live.
1000616102.korean: 그리고 저희가 지낼 터전을 사령관님이 만들어 주셨습니다.

1000616105.english: Hehe, I end up saying this twice a day.
1000616105.korean: 후훗, 하루에 이 말을 두 번씩이나 하게 되는군요.

1000616106.english: I'm done packing... I'll call the commander...

1000616109.english: Ta-da~ How about the chocolate that our Emily made?
1000616109.korean: 짠~ 우리 에밀리가 만든 초콜릿 어때?

1000616111.english: - I was expecting some cute chocolates, but I was called out to the courtyard and was met with something I never imagined.
1000616111.korean: - 귀여운 초콜릿을 기대하고 있던 나는 안뜰로 불려나와 상상도 못했던 것과 마주했다.

1000616115.english: - This is more like, um... chocolate.

1000616116.english: - The oversized chocolates, wrapped in cute plastic wrappers and with a heavy presence on both my arms, are nowhere to be found.
1000616116.korean: - 어디서 구했는지 귀여운 비닐포장지에 담긴 초대형 초콜릿은 내 양 팔 위에서 묵직하게 존재감을 과시하고 있다.

1000616117.english: Don't worry too much. It'll taste fine.
1000616117.korean: 너무 걱정 마. 맛은 괜찮을 거야.

1000616118.english: - Aurora gave me hope when I was feeling lost.

1000616119.english: - As expected from a patissier. No matter how scary the exterior may be, the taste is...
1000616119.korean: - 역시 파티시에르구나. 아무리 겉모양은 무시무시하더라도 맛은...

1000616120.english: There's something called beginner's luck or something like that... hahaha...
1000616120.korean: 초심자의 행운이라거나, 뭐 그런게 있으니까... 아하하...

1000616121.english: - Well, I guess I'll have to try it first. Emily's bright eyes are starting to feel burdensome.
1000616121.korean: - 이, 일단 맛을 보긴 해야겠지. 초롱초롱한 에밀리의 눈빛이 슬슬 부담스럽다.

1000616123.english: - Emily took out the kitchen knife she had prepared.
1000616123.korean: - 에밀리는 준비성 좋게도 챙겨온 식칼을 꺼내들었다.

1000616125.english: - Emily answered fiercely and began to crunch the monster chocolate in my hand as she fumbled to remove the plastic packaging.
1000616125.korean: - 맹하게 대답하며 비닐 포장을 주섬주섬 벗겨낸 에밀리는 내 손에 들린 괴물 초콜릿을 서걱서걱 자르기 시작했다.

1000616126.english: - I felt a sharp pain in my hand.

1000616127.english: - The chocolate that was missed by the wind fell to the floor, and drops of blood formed on the plastic packaging.
1000616127.korean: - 그 바람에 놓친 초콜릿이 바닥에 떨어지고, 비닐 포장 위로 핏방울이 점점이 맺힌다.

1000616131.english: - The agents came rushing in and checked my condition.

1000616133.english: - I reached out my uninjured hand to Emily, who was panicking and not knowing what to do.
1000616133.korean: - 나는 패닉에 빠져 어쩔줄 몰라하는 에밀리에게 다치지 않은 손을 뻗었다.

1000616134.english: [c][57e137]A little while ago, Tiamat was walking through the castle, lost in thought[-][/c]
1000616134.korean: [c][57e137]조금 전, 생각에 잠겨 성 안을 걷던 티아멧[-][/c]

1000616135.english: - I was walking around the garden trying to calm my restless mind when I found the Commander.
1000616135.korean: - 좀처럼 진정되지 않는 마음을 가라앉히며 정원을 거닐다 사령관님을 발견했습니다.

1000616137.english: - I tried to suppress the urge to run straight to the commander and hid nearby.
1000616137.korean: - 그대로 사령관님에게 달려가고 싶은 마음을 애써 참으며 근처에 몸을 숨겼습니다.

1000616138.english: - Is that what you're holding in your hand... chocolate?
1000616138.korean: - 손에 들고 계신 저건... 설마 초콜릿일까요?

1000616139.english: - It's uglier than the one I made... As expected, the Commander also has a troubled expression on his face.
1000616139.korean: - 제가 만들었던 것보다 더 못생겼네요... 역시 사령관님도 난감한 표정을 짓고 계시고요.

1000616140.english: - Emily took out a knife to cut it because it was too big.
1000616140.korean: - 너무 커서 자르려는건지 에밀리가 칼을 꺼냈습니다.

1000616142.english: - I forgot that I was secretly peeking and ended up speaking without thinking.
1000616142.korean: - 몰래 엿보고 있었다는 것도 잊고 무심코 목소리를 내고 말았습니다.

1000616143.english: - The Commander flinches and pulls his hand away, and drops of blood fall onto the chocolate wrapper that is thrown to the floor.
1000616143.korean: - 사령관님이 움찔하며 손을 떼고, 바닥에 내동댕이쳐진 초콜릿의 포장지 위로 핏방울이 떨어집니다.

1000616144.english: - And... the Commander raised his hand towards the fidgeting Emily.
1000616144.korean: - 그리고... 안절부절하는 에밀리를 향해 사령관님이 손을 치켜들었습니다.

1000616145.english: - I couldn't find the courage to watch, so I closed my eyes tightly.
1000616145.korean: - 도저히 지켜볼 용기가 나지않아 눈을 질끈 감았습니다.

1000616146.english: - But as time passes, the expected scream is not heard.
1000616146.korean: - 하지만 시간이 지나도 예상했던 비명소리는 들려오지 않습니다.

1000616147.english: - When Emily carefully opened her eyes, the Commander's hand was on her head.
1000616147.korean: - 조심스럽게 눈을 떠보자 에밀리의 머리 위에 사령관님의 손이 얹혀있습니다.

1000616148.english: - As the Commander smiled and whispered something, Emily, who was sobbing in a panic, slowly calmed down.
1000616148.korean: - 사령관님이 웃으며 뭐라고 속삭이자 패닉 상태로 울먹이고 있던 에밀리도 천천히 진정되어갔습니다.

1000616149.english: - The people around me who had momentarily frozen were soon laughing and chatting again...
1000616149.korean: - 순간적으로 얼어붙었던 주변 분들도 이내 다시 웃고 떠들고...

1000616153.english: - I don't want to admit that such a world exists, for fear of being deceived again, or betrayed.
1000616153.korean: - 또 속을까봐, 배신당할까봐... 저런 세상도 있다는 걸 인정하기 싫은 겁니다.

1000616155.english: - The commander's eyes widened when he discovered me.
1000616155.korean: - 저를 발견한 사령관님의 두 눈이 휘둥그레졌습니다.

1000616156.english: - Soon, those eyes gently curved and formed the comfortable smile that they always had.
1000616156.korean: - 이내 그 눈은 부드럽게 휘어져 항상 보던 편안한 웃음을 만듭니다.

1000616157.english: Let's eat together. It may look a little scary, but it's delicious.
1000616157.korean: 같이 먹자. 생긴 건 조금 무서워도 맛있어.

1000616158.english: - The chocolate piece I received in a panic was bumpy and ugly...
1000616158.korean: - 엉겁결에 받아든 초콜릿 조각은 울퉁불퉁하고, 못생겨서...

1000616159.english: - While I was absentmindedly putting chocolate in my mouth, the commander reached out his hand to me.
1000616159.korean: - 멍하니 초콜릿을 입에 넣는 사이에 사령관이 제게 손을 뻗었습니다.

1000616160.english: My chest swelled with anticipation. I closed my eyes, waiting for the touch of a hand on my head. A moment later, a click was heard, followed by a small prickle on my forehead.
1000616160.korean: - 가슴 속이 기대감으로 부풀어오릅니다. 머리에 닿을 손의 감촉을 기다리며 눈을 감고 잠시 후, 딱 소리와 함께 이마에 작은 아픔이 느껴졌습니다.

1000616162.english: What if I come alone? Just tell me from now on. Okay?
1000616162.korean: 혼자 오면 어떡해. 앞으로는 말이라도 해 줘. 알았지?

1000616163.english: - The words that at first glance seem like a scolding are full of worry.
1000616163.korean: - 언뜻 나무라는 듯한 말에는 걱정이 한가득 담겨있습니다.

1000616164.english: - Something inside me feels like it's going to break at the sound of that warm voice and the pain I feel on my forehead.
1000616164.korean: - 그 따뜻한 음성과 이마에서 느껴지는 아픔에 제 안에서 무언가 무너져 버릴 것 같습니다.

1000616165.english: I'll go scout and come back...!

1000616167.english: - As I flew up and headed out of the castle, the Metal Parasites that had sensed me began to swarm me one by one.
1000616167.korean: - 날아올라 성 밖으로 향하자 저를 감지한 철충들이 하나 둘 몰려들었습니다.

1000616168.english: - ...It's better. You can forget about other things while fighting.
1000616168.korean: - ...차라리 잘 됐습니다. 싸우는 중엔 다른 것들을 잊을 수 있으니까요.

1000616169.english: - I have to admit it. I'm too weak to overcome everything on my own.
1000616169.korean: - 인정할 수밖에 없습니다. 모든 것을 혼자서 이겨내기엔 저는 너무 약합니다.

1000616171.english: - The greatsword feels heavier than usual.

1000616172.english: - ...Now it's the limit. Hiding my true feelings, trying to manage everything on my own somehow...
1000616172.korean: - ...이제는 한계입니다. 속마음을 감추는 것도, 어떻게든 혼자서 해내려는 것도...

1000616173.english: - No, if I hadn't met the commander, I might have been able to hold on a little longer.
1000616173.korean: - 아니, 사령관을 만나지 않았다면 조금은 더 버틸 수 있었을지도 모릅니다.

1000616174.english: - Enduring and enduring like that, in the end, it must have become irreversible.
1000616174.korean: - 그렇게 버티고 버티다, 결국 돌이킬 수 없게 되어버렸겠죠.

1000616175.english: - The 'Well done' candy the Commander gave me... Looking back, it was through this that the Commander continued to speak to me.
1000616175.korean: - 사령관이 주신 '참 잘했어요' 사탕... 돌이켜보면 이걸 통해 사령관은 제게 계속 말해주신 겁니다.

1000616176.english: - 'You can come and rest whenever it suits you.', 'I'm always on your side.'
1000616176.korean: - '네가 편할 때 와서 쉬면 된다.' , '나는 언제든 네 편이다' ...

1000616178.english: - If you extend your hand to me like that, when I am barely, really barely holding on,
1000616178.korean: - 간신히, 정말로 간신히 버티고 있는 저에게 그렇게 손을 내밀어 버리시면,

1000616179.english: - If you show me that kind of appearance, I can't help but feel weak, right?
1000616179.korean: - 그런 모습을 보여줘버리시면 마음이 약해질 수밖에 없잖아요?

1000616180.english: - After being betrayed so many times... don't you want to trust me again...?
1000616180.korean: - 지금껏 그렇게나 배신당했으면서... 또 한번 믿고 싶어지잖아요...?

1000616182.english: - I bit my lip because I felt like crying like an idiot.
1000616182.korean: - 바보같이 눈물이 나올 것 같아서 입술을 깨물었습니다.

1000616183.english: - In front of me... a Bioroid with a fierce face appeared.
1000616183.korean: - 그런 제 앞에... 맹한 얼굴의 바이오로이드가 나타났습니다.

1000616187.english: - Emily slowly approached me and put her hand on my head.
1000616187.korean: - 에밀리는 천천히 다가오더니 제 머리위로 손을 뻗었습니다.

1000616189.english: - I guess a butterfly was sitting on my head before I knew it.
1000616189.korean: - 어느새 제 머리위에 나비가 앉아 있었나 봅니다.

1000616191.english: - Emily gave me a hard look for a while and then asked.
1000616191.korean: - 에밀리는 한동안 제게 맹한 시선을 보내다 물었습니다.

1000616192.english: ...was on patrol. How's Emily? ...Is the Commander alright?

1000616193.english: Yeah. The commander is fine... He said he's fine, so...

1000616194.english: But I still want to apologize for hurting you...

1000616195.english: - Even as we talk, Emily's gaze is fixed on the butterflies fluttering above our heads.
1000616195.korean: - 이야기 하면서도 에밀리의 시선은 저희 머리 위를 날아다니는 나비에게 고정되어 있습니다.

1000616196.english: - I collapsed to the floor, watching Emily stagger and chase the butterfly.
1000616196.korean: - 비틀거리며 나비를 쫓아다니는 에밀리를 보며 바닥에 털썩 주저앉았습니다.

1000616197.english: ...Actually, I wanted to trust you from the beginning, Commander.

1000616198.english: - Maybe it's because the other person is Emily. My true feelings just spilled out without me knowing.
1000616198.korean: - 상대가 에밀리라서일까요. 저도 모르게 속마음이 툭 튀어나왔습니다.

1000616199.english: - Without a moment of surprise, once the inner feelings have leaked out, they flow out endlessly like a broken dam.
1000616199.korean: - 놀랄 새도 없이, 한 번 새어나온 속마음은 둑이 무너진 것처럼 하염없이 흘러나옵니다.

1000616200.english: - Briefly about the work in the lab that I don't really want to talk about.
1000616200.korean: - 별로 말하고 싶지 않은 실험실에서의 일은 간략히.

1000616201.english: - Next, what happened when I was saved by Labiata and fought her. And then...
1000616201.korean: - 다음으로는 라비아타에게 구해져서 싸울때의 일들. 그리고...

1000616202.english: - The things that surprised me, the things that made me doubt, the things that made me happy, the things that made me happy...
1000616202.korean: - 사령관님을 만나고 놀랐던 일, 의심했던 일, 기뻤던 일, 기뻤던 일...
